name: Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sugar (could be less if you like, it was very sweet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together wet ingredients.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined. Do not over beat.
4. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan or line with parchment paper.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before cutting.
Microwave Instructions:
1. In a microwave-safe bowl, whisk together wet ingredients.
2. Whisk dry ingredients separately.
3. Combine wet and dry mixtures until just moistened.
4. Pour batter into an ungreased 9-inch pie plate or round microwaveable cake pan.
5. Microwave on high for 5-6 minutes, or until the surface appears dry.
6. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
